verdict_reasoning: IZUMO4 is a member of the IZUMO sperm-egg fusion family. While it lacks a TM domain itself and NCBI notes nuclear localization, IZUMO4 forms disulfide-linked complexes with IZUMO1 (a TM sperm surface protein) on the sperm plasma membrane, where it participates in the fertilization complex. This stable complex partnership co-traffics it to the sperm surface in this specific cell type.
